candidate_definition_hints.text: Non-blocking direnv integration daemon with tmux support that provides instant shell prompts by running direnv asynchronously in the background.
Non-blocking direnv integration daemon with tmux/zellij support that provides instant shell prompts by running direnv asynchronously in the background.
